## window() function

Create a new flexiblely designed window with a viewmodel. An arrow function can be used to create windows to fit a specific viewmodel.

**Signature:**

```typescript
declare function window<TModel extends object>(params: (model: TModel) => WindowParams): WindowTemplate<TModel>;
```

**Returns:**

[WindowTemplate](./openrct2-flexui.windowtemplate.md)<!-- -->&lt;TModel&gt;

## Example

class MyModel { header: store("Hello world!") }

const template = window<MyModel>(model =<!-- -->&gt; (<!-- -->{ title: model.header }<!-- -->))

template.open(new MyModel())
